race.description: Winter Blues At The Races 24th July Hcp (56)
race.comment: MAGNEA (9) has put together back-to-back placings after scoring three back at Carrathool, most recently beaten 1.5 lengths into second over 1200m at Mornington. Suitably placed so anticipating another big run. POINT OF ECSTASY (7) finds the perfect race to enhance her already impressive first-up record, which reads two starts for a win and a second. Recent Ararat jumpout win suggests she's going as well as ever. MISS HIMALAYA (10) finished 3.1 lengths away from the winner last time at Wangaratta in the wet and gets some weight relief here. Has claims if runs up to her mark. ROCKETTE ROULETTE (11) progressed nicely last time out when she made late ground to finish just 1.5 lengths from the winner in third over 1200m at Pakenham. Has the talent to build on that encouraging effort last start.
